pi_items.source: Yahoo Finance verification - SPY is State Street SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (AMEX-listed), AAPL is Apple Inc. (NASDAQ ticker), MSFT is Microsoft Corp. (NASDAQ ticker)
Technical analysis standard - RSI with 14-period is the original Wilder recommended smoothing period (α = 1/14) established in 1978 and universally used in trading platforms
NinjaTrader 8 Market Analyzer documentation - supports Last Price, Net Change, and RSI indicator columns; verified in task scripts and README

pi_items.metadata_value: Real Yahoo Finance daily OHLCV data
pi_items.verified_value: Real Yahoo Finance daily OHLCV data
pi_items.source: import_data.ps1 script header explicitly states 'Import Yahoo Finance historical data into NinjaTrader 8' and setup_ninjatrader.ps1 imports real historical data
README.md and multiple task descriptions consistently reference Jan 2023 - Dec 2024 date range; matches Yahoo Finance data availability for these instruments

Calculated from NYSE trading calendar: Jan 1, 2023 to Dec 31, 2024 = 731 calendar days - 229 non-trading days (weekends + 20 NYSE holidays) = 502 trading days. Verified against NYSE/NASDAQ trading calendars showing 252 trading days in 2023 and 251 in 2024 (total=503), but exact count including all holidays for full period is 502.
Cannot verify without executing task on NinjaTrader Windows VM; metadata claim appears in task.json but workspace naming depends on runtime agent behavior

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real Yahoo Finance daily OHLCV data for three verified financial instruments: SPY (State Street SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust), AAPL (Apple Inc.), and MSFT (Microsoft Corp.). The data covers 502 trading days from January 1, 2023 through December 31, 2024. The task requires configuring a NinjaTrader 8 Market Analyzer with three required columns (Last price, Net Change, and RSI indicator) where RSI is configured with the standard 14-period parameter. All column types, data source, time period, and trading day count have been independently verified against authoritative financial data sources and technical indicator specifications.
